baccarat: Baccarat bets are chosen by the player/timer shell only.
blackjack: Blackjack uses timer/button shell actions only on this table build.
canasta: Practice-table Canasta AI: draw-two then discard by meld-weight heuristic.
crazy-eights: Crazy Eights AI: random tiers plus suit choice on eights.
demo-custom: Demo deck reveal step — driven only by the human/UI button.
durak: Durak AI: low-card attacks and minimal winning defenses.
go-fish: Go Fish AI: ranked asks by hand composition and opponent hand size.
high-card-duel: Timer-driven duel — table AI does not pick bets.
pinochle: 2-player pinochle: heads-up trick logic (no partner feeding).
poker-draw: Heads-up draw poker steps are shell/timer driven here.
sequence-race: Sequence race AI: greedy pile matching with tiered randomness.
thirty-one: Thirty-One AI: knock thresholds and one-step hand-value lookahead.
uno: Heuristic table AI for Uno seats.
war: War resolves via shell “Play round”; no per-seat AI choice.
